message:
fix(codegen): fix type mismatches and unclosed if-blocks in Zig codegen

- Close remaining if-blocks before while loop ends in emitNativeLoop
  and emitNativeLoopBlock (fixes syntax errors)
- Add .toJSValue() conversions for CompressedValue->JSValue in call args
- Add CV.fromJSValue() wrapping for JSValue->CompressedValue stack results
- Fix definePropertyStr, emitCallMethod, emitCallConstructor, emitArrayFrom
